raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX, I was charged {$2300.00} by XXXX XXXX & XXXX for XXXX work that was never completed. After payment, the XXXX falsely claimed the work was done, but an inspection confirmed it was not performed. 

I filed a dispute with Best Buy Citibank and submitted supporting documentation. Related charges from the same project were investigated and resolved in my favor. However, this specific dispute ( XXXX ID XXXX ) was closed in XX/XX/XXXX without any notification to me. 

Citibank later claimed they needed additional documentation by XX/XX/XXXX, but I was never contacted or informed. I only discovered the closure when I called on XX/XX/XXXX. I re-submitted a detailed letter with evidence and a police report against the merchant. I also resent the documents via fax and mail on XX/XX/XXXX and requested the dispute be reopened. Additionally, when I called on XX/XX/XXXX, Citi refused to reopen the dispute. During that call, the representative XXXX XXXX case id XXXX ) refused to assist further. 

Because the services were never provided and the dispute was improperly closed without notice, I am requesting a full refund of {$2300.00} and that this case be reopened and properly reviewed.
